headline: Marc Cucurella — update
body: 🚨 Marc Cucurella: “The transfer to Real Madrid happened very fast. It took 36 hours. I was so happy!”. “They called me in the morning and told me that the clubs had talked about everything, that if I wanted to go there. I had no doubt, it w
text:
🚨 Marc Cucurella: “The transfer to Real Madrid happened very fast. It took 36 hours. I was so happy!”.

“They called me in the morning and told me that the clubs had talked about everything, that if I wanted to go there. I had no doubt, it was a big step for my career”. 🫱🏻‍🫲🏼 https://t.co/t2SASF57mv
